overall.description: Game engine footage from a truck driving simulator showing a first-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin. The vehicle drives along a snow-covered multi-lane highway at night, passing through a well-lit tunnel before emerging back into snowy conditions. The scene features realistic dashboard details, dynamic snowfall, and lighting transitions between the dark exterior and bright tunnel interior.

events.description: approaching tunnel entrance with illuminated opening visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving truck on snowy highway following a white car ahead at steady speed

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead on the highway maintaining distance

entered.detail: Mercedes truck interior dashboard with steering wheel, gauges, and GPS navigation screen
snowflakes accumulating on the windshield glass
snow-covered ground and barriers along the left side of the highway
snow-covered embankment with occasional rock faces on the right side
metal highway guardrail on the left side of the road
metal highway guardrail on the right side of the road
white passenger car driving in the same lane ahead
white lane markings visible on the snow-dusted asphalt

segments.scene_description: Driving on a snow-covered multi-lane highway at night, with snowflakes visible on the windshield and snow banks lining both sides of the road. The truck follows a white car ahead while approaching a tunnel entrance illuminated in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete highway tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: entering tunnel from snowy exterior into enclosed concrete corridor
ambient lighting shifts from dark blue night to warm yellow artificial tunnel lights
approaching tunnel exit with dark snowy exterior becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel following the vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead continuing through the tunnel maintaining distance

entered.detail: concrete tunnel wall with horizontal construction lines
concrete tunnel wall with occasional emergency exit doors
rows of warm yellow overhead lights illuminating the tunnel

segments.scene_description: Driving through a well-lit concrete tunnel with warm yellow overhead lighting. The windshield is clear of snow in the sheltered environment, and the truck continues following the vehicle ahead through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered highway continuing after tunnel exit

events.description: exiting tunnel back into open snowy night environment

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and continuing along the snowy highway at steady speed

entered.detail: snowflakes returning to the windshield as the truck exits the sheltered tunnel
snow-covered ground along the left side of the highway
snow-covered embankment with rocky outcrops on the right side
metal highway guardrail on the left side
metal highway guardrail on the right side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel back into the open snowy night, with snow immediately beginning to accumulate on the windshield again. The truck continues along the snow-lined highway with guardrails visible on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it travels from a snowy night highway through a bright tunnel and back into the winter storm. It begins on a multi-lane road where snowflakes drift across the windshield and snow banks line the edges, with the vehicle following a white car toward a distant, illuminated tunnel entrance. As the truck enters the concrete corridor, the environment shifts abruptly to a sheltered space with warm yellow overhead lighting and a clear windshield. The scene then transitions back into the open night as the truck exits the tunnel, causing snow to immediately accumulate once more on the glass. Finally, the camera continues forward along the snow-lined highway, passing guardrails under the dark, wintry sky.
